title: Inside front
artPrompt: Quiet inside-cover atmosphere, no text. Soft Gateway glow through timber arch; invitation to read. Warm parchment light. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Riftwilds Comic Publishing — original fantasy. No crypto required to read.
Credits & cosmetics may unlock along the way. The story itself stays free.
